title: rubus vulgaris f. laciniatus
intro: Rubus vulgaris f. laciniatus, also known as Cut-leaved Raspberry, is a variety of the common raspberry plant, characterized by its cut or laciniate leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high content of ellagic acid and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris f. laciniatus include potential anti-cancer properties, improved cardiovascular health, and antioxidant effects that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Rubus vulgaris f. laciniatus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to support overall health and well-being.
